title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Treebo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Treebo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Treebo Hotels in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
